title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
